response.original_title: +1-[850].600.1393 Why is Onchain wallet holding my funds? Redeem-Now
response.overview: If you need assistance for hold funds, you can contact ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 our Onchain wallet customer support team through phone, email, live chat, or the support section on our website/app. Provide your account details and a clear description of your issue so the team ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 can help you more quickly. If you're looking for common customer support ☎️ +1-[850].600.1393 queries related to **On-chain wallet deposits and withdrawals**, here is a categorized list that exchanges, crypto wallets, fintech platforms, and blockchain service providers frequently receive. Because the Crypto.com Onchain Wallet is a non-custodial wallet, the platform technically does not hold your funds. Your crypto is stored on the blockchain, and the app simply acts as an interface to view your keys.
